content_markdown: A force that varies sinusoidally is applied to a system that is lightly damped. Which of the following must be true of the force for resonance to occur?

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram provided in the image.

options.label: A
options.text: It must always be in anti-phase with the oscillations of the system.

options.label: B
options.text: Its direction must always be in the direction of motion of the oscillations of the system.

options.label: C
options.text: Its frequency must be equal to the frequency of oscillation of the system.

options.label: D
options.text: Its amplitude must be equal to the amplitude of oscillation of the system.

vibe_explanation: Resonance occurs when the frequency of the periodic driving force matches the natural frequency of the system, leading to a maximum transfer of energy and a large amplitude of oscillation.
